name: Tent
hint: A portable shelter used for camping and outdoor sleeping.

name: Sleeping Bag
hint: A insulated bag for sleeping in while camping.

name: Campfire Grill
hint: A grill used for cooking food over a campfire.

name: Flashlight
hint: A portable light source for illuminating the campsite at night.

name: Backpack
hint: A bag for carrying camping gear, food, and supplies.

name: Camp Chair
hint: A portable chair for sitting around the campsite.

name: Camping Stove
hint: A portable stove for cooking meals while camping.

name: Cooler
hint: An insulated container for keeping food and drinks cold.

name: Hiking Boots
hint: Sturdy boots designed for hiking and outdoor activities.

name: Pocket Knife
hint: A multi-purpose folding knife for various camping tasks.

name: Water Bottle
hint: A container for carrying and drinking water while hiking.

name: Camp Axe
hint: A small axe used for chopping wood for the campfire.

name: Camping Pot Set
hint: A set of pots and pans for cooking meals in the wilderness.

name: First Aid Kit
hint: A kit containing medical supplies for treating minor injuries.

name: Compass
hint: A navigational tool for finding directions in the wilderness.

name: Insect Repellent
hint: A substance to deter insects and bugs while camping.

name: Camp Tarp
hint: A waterproof tarp used for shelter and ground protection.

name: Camping Table
hint: A portable table for cooking and dining at the campsite.

name: Camp Mugs
hint: Mugs for drinking hot beverages around the campfire.

name: Headlamp
hint: A hands-free flashlight worn on the head for nighttime activities.

name: Camp Hammock
hint: A portable hammock for relaxing and sleeping in the outdoors.

name: Camp Utensil Set
hint: A set of utensils for eating meals while camping.

name: Campfire Starter Kit
hint: Materials for easily starting a campfire, such as firewood and kindling.

name: Tent Pegs
hint: Metal or plastic pegs used to secure the tent to the ground.

name: Camping Pillow
hint: A compact pillow for sleeping comfortably in a sleeping bag.

name: Folding Shovel
hint: A compact shovel for digging and various campsite tasks.

name: Campfire Tripod
hint: A tripod for suspending a pot or pan over the campfire.

name: Solar Charger
hint: A device for charging electronic devices using solar energy.

name: Camp Broom
hint: A small broom for keeping the campsite clean and free of debris.

name: Camp Shower
hint: A portable bag for heating and dispensing water for showers.

name: Camp Griddle
hint: A flat cooking surface for preparing pancakes and other foods.

name: Camp Tableware
hint: Dishes, bowls, and utensils for serving meals while camping.

name: Survival Whistle
hint: A whistle with various survival features for emergencies.

name: Campfire Gloves
hint: Heat-resistant gloves for handling hot cookware and campfire logs.

name: Camp Cot
hint: A portable folding bed for elevated sleeping in the tent.

name: Camp Lantern
hint: A portable light source for illuminating the campsite.

name: Bear Canister
hint: A container for safely storing food to prevent bear encounters.

name: Water Purifier
hint: A device for purifying natural water sources for drinking.

name: Campfire Roasting Sticks
hint: Sticks used for roasting marshmallows and other campfire treats.

name: Camp Cookware Set
hint: A set of pots, pans, and utensils for campsite cooking.
